source.sourcePath: raw/sources/DHF (인허가)/07_(CYAN) GT1717C, GT1717CP/90_규격 Test report/1. 시험소 제출서류/04. 회로도_패턴도_부품배치도_블록다이어그램/1. 회로도/1. Cyan(GT1717C,GT1717CP)_Main/Cyan(GT1717C,GT1717CP)_Main.pdf

sourceSummary.oneLine: CYAN_MAIN schematic package for CYAN/GT1717C/GT1717CP main board circuits.
sourceSummary.officialUse: Source path identifies this as test-laboratory submission material within a DHF licensing/regulatory package.
keyPoints: Revision table states: V1.0 04/06/2025 All Rev1.0 Release.

Title blocks identify document number CYAN_MAIN, Rev 3, with sheets covering POE+ main power, LINE/AED mode, power rails, FPGA, DDR3, LVDS to MIPI, IMX8-MINI, device, ROIC, AED board, LAN board, and GND hole.
Product identifiers GT1717C and GT1717CP appear in the source path and filename.
Design notes include impedance and length-matching requirements for Ethernet, LVDS, DDR3, MIPI, PCIe, and related high-speed signals.

The AED board note states all components except the sensor are mounted on the top side only.
evidence.evidenceText: All components except the sensor are mounted on the top side only.

evidence.claim: The LAN board note states all components are mounted on the top side only.

reviewFlags.reason: No explicit regulatory authority or jurisdiction is present in the source text; authoritySignal is only 'general'.
Revision metadata is conflicting or ambiguous: revision table lists V1.0 while title blocks show Rev 3.
Document date metadata is conflicting or ambiguous: revision table shows 04/06/2025, cover/title block shows Monday, March 16, 2026, and most sheets show Thursday, March 12, 2026.
No external standards are explicitly cited; impedance and length-matching notes are design requirements, not identified standards.
OCR/text extraction quality is low in places, with repeated title blocks, spacing artifacts, and inconsistent strings such as POWER rendered as POW ER.
